message:
feat(core,membrane): expand allocator, RCU, pressure sensor, and fragmentation storm tests

- core/malloc/allocator.rs: concurrent agent updates to memory
  allocator implementation
- core/rcu/mod.rs: Read-Copy-Update module refinements for lock-free
  concurrent data structure access patterns
- membrane/pressure_sensor.rs: updates to memory pressure sensing
  module for system resource monitoring
- membrane/tests/fragmentation_storms_test.rs: expand fragmentation
  storm test scenarios for memory subsystem stress validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
